title: GiveawayOG
description: The ultimate giveaway solution for modern Minecraft servers.
body:
![main image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/190dd83b26407943e41362e3792ceb8aed500787.png)


![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3914238c9311c3426e9b6691f1e5d0ff6f7a579d.jpeg)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aadeaf5931e93e4b7401414d14868cd88dca8e7b.png)

<details>
<summary>📜 Text Transcript</summary>

GiveawayOG is a powerful and lightweight giveaway plugin for Minecraft servers, built to host giveaways in a smooth and professional way.

It includes modern features like animated giveaway announcements, automatic reward distribution, scheduled giveaways, and full customization support for every server.

Key Features:
- Animated giveaway announcements
- Automatic reward distribution to winners
- Scheduled giveaways with timers
- Bossbar and actionbar support
- Sounds and particle effects
- Placeholder support for dynamic messages
- Fully configurable rewards, messages, and settings
- Discord webhook integration 
- Optimized performance and standalone (no dependencies required)

Commands:
- /giveaway start
- /giveaway menu
- /giveaway createvoucher <animation_name> <command>
- /giveaway reload

Permission:
- giveawayog.admin

Placeholder:
- %giveaway_timer%

</details>
